Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Mithra]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Mithra is the thirteenth Dragon’s Fang and was forged by Valin the Wanderer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Mithra can only be wielded by someone with the power of Valinhall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Mithra is a sword held by Kai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Mithra is a sword described as the Master's finest work.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Mithra is a silver-and-gold blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Mithra is a golden Dragon's Fang and the original sword of the Wanderer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Mithra is a sword wielded by Valin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Mithra chose the thirteenth Dragon's Fang heir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — Mithra's blade has a core of gold running up its center.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — Mithra is an item that a squad of Damascan soldiers stumbled in front of.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Mithra turns Simon and Azura aside.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Simon had to knock Mithra aside during the fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Mithra is a blade used by the Valinhall Incarnation.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 1''' — Mithra is the name of the Wanderer's blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 5''' — Mithra is a gold-lined Dragon's Fang sword used by Kai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — Mithra is a sword that Kai can banish within the House.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Mithra is a blade that can communicate emotions to its wielder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Kai laid Mithra down on the ground.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 23''' — Mithra is a Dragon's Fang.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Mithra is a weapon that the Eldest Nye once held.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Mithra is a sword held by Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Mithra is a sword that remains quiet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Mithra is something Simon can summon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Mithra felt resigned and eager.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Simon uses Mithra to strike King Zakareth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 28''' — Simon has a Mithra.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
